_note: ZAO Trivia question bank. The /game/zao-trivia game picks 10 at random per round AND shuffles each question's options at render time (so the correct answer is not always the same index - keep facts accurate, order does not matter). Each question: q, options (4), answer (0-based index of the correct option in THIS array), explain (one line shown after answering). Keep facts accurate to the ZAO ecosystem - this is the weekly Wednesday 11:30am EST live quiz where finishers split the pot. Add questions by appending to questions[]. No emojis, no em dashes.

questions.q: What is ZABAL Gamez?
questions.explain: ZABAL Gamez is The ZAO's free 3-month build event - June workshops, July open build, August Finals.

questions.q: What are the three ZABAL Gamez tracks?
questions.explain: Three tracks: artist (musical/visual), builder (developer/aspiring), creator (media/distribution).

questions.q: What is Empire Builder?
questions.explain: Empire Builder is the community-layer framework - leaderboards, boosters, and rewards, token-based or tokenless.

questions.q: What does POIDH stand for?
questions.explain: POIDH - Pics Or It Didn't Happen - is an open bounty protocol on Base.

questions.q: What is Respect in the ZAO?
questions.explain: Respect is soulbound and non-transferable - governance weight earned through weekly contribution and peer consensus.

questions.q: What does WaveWarZ let artists do?
options: Earn from music battles, not streams
questions.explain: WaveWarZ flips the model - artists earn from music battles instead of streams.

questions.q: What is Bonfire in the ZAO ecosystem?
options: A shared AI memory / knowledge graph
questions.explain: Bonfire is a shared AI workspace where a group grows a collective, ownable memory - a knowledge graph.

questions.q: How long has the ZAO run weekly Respect sessions?
questions.explain: The ZAO has run weekly for 100+ weeks straight - that consistency is the foundation.

questions.q: What does Vini App let you do?
options: Build a real app from a plain-language prompt
questions.explain: Vini App lets anyone - even non-coders - build a real app from a plain prompt; it ships with a wallet and a token.

questions.q: When is the ZABAL Gamez open build month?
questions.explain: June is workshops, July is the open build, August is the Finals.

questions.q: What chain do ZABAL Gamez bounties and builds live on?
questions.explain: ZABAL Gamez runs on Base - POIDH bounties, Empire, and the Finals all settle there.

questions.q: What is a 'fractal' in the ZAO sense?
options: A way to make group decisions fair, fast, and fun
questions.explain: Fractals make community decisions fair, fast, and fun, using Respect from weekly contributions and peer consensus.

questions.q: What is the ZABAL Gamez August event called?
questions.explain: August is the Finals - a cohort curated from July, settled via the WaveWarZ-Base prediction market.

questions.q: What is the monthly prize on the ZAO 2048 game?
questions.explain: On /play, the top 10 each month win $Zabal.

questions.q: What is the ZAO's arcade call-to-action button?
questions.explain: Insert Coin is the ZABAL Gamez arcade mark and its sitewide CTA.

questions.q: What does ZABAL Gamez cost to enter?
options: Nothing - it's free and open to anyone
questions.explain: ZABAL Gamez is free and open to anyone, on any harness - artist, builder, or creator.

questions.q: Which track fits a developer?
questions.explain: The builder track is for developers and aspiring developers.

questions.q: What is SANG?
questions.explain: SANG is SongJam's token.

questions.q: What is Magnetiq?
options: An all-in-one event and launch platform
questions.explain: Magnetiq is the all-in-one event and launch platform hosting the ZABAL Gamez collectible and registration surface.

questions.q: What are ZOLs?
questions.explain: ZOLs are ZAO contribution credits.

questions.q: How do the ZABAL Gamez Finals settle?
options: A WaveWarZ prediction market on Base
questions.explain: The August Finals settle through the WaveWarZ-Base prediction market.

questions.q: Base is an Ethereum Layer 2 incubated by?
questions.explain: Base is an Ethereum L2 incubated by Coinbase - where the ZAO ecosystem builds.

questions.q: In ZAO 2048, what is the top tile you merge up to?
questions.explain: ZAO 2048 merges the ecosystem brands all the way up to THE ZAO.

questions.q: What is a Farcaster Mini App?
options: An app that runs inside Farcaster
questions.explain: A Mini App runs inside Farcaster - ZABAL Gamez is one.

questions.q: Who can join ZABAL Gamez?
questions.explain: It is open to anyone, on any harness - not just developers or existing members.

questions.q: What is Eden Fractal about?
questions.explain: Eden Fractal runs fractal governance - making group decisions with Respect.

questions.q: How can you earn from a workshop recording?
options: Clip a 45-60s moment and submit it for the bounty
questions.explain: Cut a 45-60s clip of any recording and submit it for that recording's POIDH bounty - best clip wins the pot.

questions.q: What does 'building in public' mean for the July build?
options: Sharing your build and progress openly
questions.explain: July is the open build - you register a repo and build in public so the community can follow and vote.

questions.q: What is SongJam?
options: A music project in the ZAO ecosystem
questions.explain: SongJam is a music project in the ZAO ecosystem; its token is SANG.

questions.q: What do you keep when you build for ZABAL Gamez?
questions.explain: You keep your repo and your work - ZABAL Gamez is about building something that outlasts the season.
